title: Fitch Revises Invitation Homes' Rating Outlook to ‘Positive' from ‘Stable'
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”), announced today that Fitch Ratings (“Fitch”) revised its rating outlook for the Company to ‘Positive' from ‘Stable' and affirmed the Company's ratings, including the ‘BBB' Long-Term Issuer Default Ratings. title: Invitation Homes Names Chief Human Resources Officer
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that Allison Mullis will join the Company as Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer on August 7. Mullis is a seasoned human resources executive who brings 20 years of leadership and human resources experience.
